productName: Dabstar Dab Stix Pre-Roll 1g - Strawberry Lemonade (S)
description: This infused sativa pre-roll wraps Strawberry Lemonade flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of lemon, strawberry, and rose, with an upbeat, talkative energy. A little goes a long way.
